meaning: n.布朗克斯(纽约市最北端的一区,鸡尾酒的一种)
examples: The actor, an only child, grew up in the Bronx.
The Bronx is one of the five boroughs of New York.
You can, for instance, tour New York neighborhoods in the Bronx, in the Bund of Shanghai.
Fordham, by contrast, was a team of scrappy kids from the Bronx and Brooklyn.
They think they're from the Bronx or Detroit, but they're from Colchester and surrounding areas.
